emails.subject: Final Notice: Outstanding Levies - Lot 7
emails.text:
Dear Pat Latimer, your levy payments for Lot 7 are $1,153.85 overdue (47 days), plus $14.86 penalty interest. This is a final notice; please contact us to arrange payment or discuss a hardship plan. If unpaid, the committee will escalate recovery.
----------------------------------------
Outstanding levies:      $1,153.85
Accrued penalty interest: $14.86
Total payable:           $1,168.71
Days overdue:            47
----------------------------------------

emails.subject: Work order — 48 Rose St Owners Corporation
emails.text:
Hi Rapid Roofing,
You've been engaged for works at 48 Rose St Owners Corporation, 48 Rose Street, Fitzroy.
Scope of work: Inspect and repair roof leak source causing ceiling staining and paint bubbling on lot 9 roofline area
Location: common property
Approved amount: $350.00 (do not exceed without written approval)
Please confirm acceptance by replying to this email, and invoice the owners corporation
on completion quoting this work order.
